author: gurukamath
content: In this implementation, a call that does not have enough balance to send value, ends up paying only the warm cost to access the target account, even if it is cold. In that case, the target account ends up in BAL but is never added to the access list. This in itself violates the "BAL is a strict subset of access list" assumption.

author: gurukamath
content:
The previous proposal seems more consistent imo where
1. An address is added to the access list when the user has paid enough gas to add it to the list
2. An address is added to the BAL when the user has actually accessed the account
